app.name: Shore Letter
app.tagline: Write to a stranger. Let the tide decide.
app.description: A letter, adrift toward the unknown. Someone on the other side of the sea is waiting.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email and click the link to sign in.
auth.aliasHint: This is how others will know you. No real name needed.
auth.avatarHint: A pet, a place, an object — anything that feels like you.

bottle.released: Your letter is on the water.
bottle.releasedSub: We'll let you know when someone finds it.

inbox.title: The Shore
inbox.empty:
The shore is quiet tonight.
Write the first letter.
inbox.aiKeepingDesc: Your letter is still drifting. An AI friend is keeping you company.

correspondence.sealConfirm: Sealing means no more letters, but your correspondence is saved forever. Seal it?
correspondence.anniversary90: 90 days — three months of knowing each other 💛

safety.crisisBody: If you're going through something difficult, please reach out for professional help.
safety.crisisLine: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline: call or text 988
safety.crisisLineUS: Crisis Text Line: text HOME to 741741
safety.reportSent: Your report has been submitted. We'll review it soon.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
